Package Summary

Version 1.0.17
License BSD
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/SawYer-Robotics/roch.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo
Last Updated 2018-12-17
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

No direct system dependencies.

roch

Use RECOMMENDED

Checkout URI https://github.com/SawYer-Robotics/roch.git

Last Updated 2018-12-17
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.

Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

roslaunch

roscpp

yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping

move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

  • launch/includes/safety_controller.launch.xml
    • Example/standalone launcher for roch's safety controller
  • launch/includes/velocity_smoother.launch.xml
    • Velocity smoother

License BSD

Use RECOMMENDED

Checkout URI https://github.com/SawYer-Robotics/roch.git

Last Updated 2018-12-17
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs

frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

roslaunch

base_local_planner

roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.

Good First Issues (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

Package Summary

Version 1.0.17
License BSD
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/SawYer-Robotics/roch.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo
Last Updated 2018-12-17
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

Package Summary

Tags No category tags.
Version 1.0.17
License BSD
Build type CATKIN
Use RECOMMENDED

Repository Summary

Checkout URI https://github.com/SawYer-Robotics/roch.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo
Last Updated 2018-12-17
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

Checkout URI https://github.com/SawYer-Robotics/roch.git
VCS Type git
VCS Version indigo
Last Updated 2018-12-17
Dev Status DEVELOPED
Released RELEASED
Tags No category tags.
Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

Contributing Help Wanted (-)
Good First Issues (-)
Pull Requests to Review (-)

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Dependant Packages

Name Deps
roch
roch_gazebo

CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

2.0.12 (2017-09-18)

2.0.11 (2017-03-23)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Dependencies

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp
sensor_msgs
catkin
amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller

System Dependencies

No direct system dependencies.

Name Deps
roch
roch_rapps
roch_gazebo

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Package Description

Autonomous mapping and navigation demos for the Soy Roch

Additional Links

  • Website
  • Bugtracker
  • Repository

Maintainers

  • Chen

Authors

  • Chen
README
No README found. See repository README.
CHANGELOG

Change log for package roch_navigation

1.0.16 (2018-03-28)

  • Remap email and website.
  • Contributors: doudou0114

1.0.15 (2017-11-16)

1.0.14 (2017-09-18)

1.0.13 (2017-05-08)

1.0.12 (2017-03-30)

1.0.11 (2017-03-23)

  • Update safety_controll.launch.xml.
  • Update dwa_local_planner_params.yaml.
  • Reduce map file size.
  • Modified lidar launch files.
  • Adjusted all launch files.

1.0.10 (2017-02-17)

  • Remove unused param events/bumper and events/wheel_drop.
  • Support Obbrec Astra.
  • Add missing package dependencies: nodelet, roch_safety_controller

1.0.9 (2017-02-07)

  • Add run depend yocs_cmd_vel_mux.
  • Add rplidar supported files with amcl and gmapping.
  • Add rplidar supported navigation param files.
  • Remove some files not used.

1.0.8 (2017-01-23)

  • Remove some not uesd maps.

1.0.7 (2017-01-22)

1.0.6 (2017-01-17)

0.0.4 (2017-01-17)

  • Modify all launch files for adjust structres.
  • For now can just use one sensor for navigation that RGDB sensor or lidar.

0.0.3 (2016-11-14)

  • Modify move_base.launch can load sensors params files
  • Add navigation of lidar

0.0.2 (2016-11-5)

  • Create param for sensors

0.0.1 (2016-9-30)

  • Create base freamwork for navigation

Deps Name
roslaunch
tf
roscpp

amcl
frontier_exploration
yocs_cmd_vel_mux
gmapping
map_server
move_base
navfn
base_local_planner
dwa_local_planner
roch_bringup
nodelet
roch_safety_controller
